articles.title: Trump's envoys Witkoff and Kushner to fly to Pakistan for Iran talks
articles.summary: Iran says its Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is already in Pakistan but that there is no meeting planned between Iran and the US.

articles.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
articles.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

articles.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
